name: Virtual AI - KURONYAM
short_description: Touching, feeling, and melting experience. Looking for a cute VR game? Neko girl "Kuronyam" is waiting for you.
detailed_description:
Kuronyam is an AI character with cat ears and tail.
You can spend time at pool house.
Become her master and enjoy the sweet time!

Features


▪Feel weight: Set the weight on hand, so experience the actual feeling.

▪Character: Kuronyam is cat girl. So you can touch cat ears and tail.

▪Place: The pool house make a sweet experience with her.

▪User Interface: The UI is in right hand, some item you can use.

▪Gesture: Let's try some gestures. Maybe she will respond.

▪Meow: Enjoy the sweet time with your Hand.

▪Touch: If she get angry, please pat on her head.
